sourceMovie.title: The Great Flood
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Great Flood (2025) stuck because it commits to its science fiction premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Kim Byung-woo's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The science fiction and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Finch
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Great Flood clicked for you, Finch (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Great Flood?
faq.answer: Try Finch, Vesper, Logan—each shares DNA with The Great Flood while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Great Flood?
faq.answer: The Great Flood (2025) is best described as Science Fiction, Adventure, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Great Flood worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
